info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Bloomberg Order Management API

description.content:
API for order and execution management, enabling algorithmic trading, smart order routing, and integration with trading platforms for buy-side workflows. Supports the full order lifecycle from creation through execution and settlement for institutional investors.
